reviews.review_description:
this app sounds nice but really sucks 
my connection stellar and can't get this thing to work

developer_response.body: Hi. The problem is fixed now. Please try again and if its possible change your review. thank you.

reviews.review_description: Very good program and visuals. The paid version offers big set of monthly and Yearly courses (all for $20) . However there is a big problem.  It does not tell which module is completed.  So we need to find ourselves which module we did previously.
I paid $19.99 for premium access, and I only get access to trial material.   Can't find support to remedy this

As someone new to meditation, I found this app incredibly easy to use. The free courses are a great introduction, and the pro courses are well worth the investment. The visuals and sounds are incredibly calming, I really love meditating in the space scenes!⭐️
